name: Quick Onion Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, sugar, cheese, and scallions in a large bowl until well mixed.
3. Stir in beer gently until the mixture forms a thick, sticky batter.
4. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan with dimensions of 8-1/2 x 4-1/2 inches.
5. Brush the top of the loaf with beaten egg.
6. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the egg.
7. Bake in the oven for 1-1/4 hours or until the loaf is browned.
8. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
